band.line: With you through arrival, academics, campus life, and growth
scene01.title: Academics
scene01.subtitle: Courses, registration, learning resources
scene01.lede: From looking up your student ID and registering for classes, to AP courses and cross-disciplinary programs — every learning resource in one place.
scene02.title: Campus Life
scene02.subtitle: Orientation, housing, support, overseas
scene02.lede: Orientation camp, scholarships, dorms and transit — we're with you as you settle into life at NCKU.
scene03.title: Growth
scene03.subtitle: Careers, services, the wider campus
scene03.lede: Career exploration, IT services, student government and campus media — so you don't just attend NCKU, you become part of it.
scene04.title: From the President
scene04.subtitle: A note from President Shen
scene04.lede: A letter from President Meng-Ru Shen to every new student stepping into NCKU — about courage, curiosity, and the people who'll walk alongside you.
scene04.president.name: Meng-Ru Shen
scene04.quote.l1: The best version of you isn't the perfect one —
scene04.quote.l2: it's the one whose persistence and courage
scene04.quote.l3: warm the world with kindness and truth.
scene04.excerpt.p1: Hello, and welcome to National Cheng Kung University!
scene04.excerpt.p2: On behalf of all our faculty, staff and students, I welcome you into the NCKU family. Your dedication and your choice deserve to be celebrated — congratulations.
scene04.excerpt.p3: University is a fresh start, and NCKU is a place where you can keep learning, growing, and exploring. Whether your questions are academic or about daily life, the Office of the First-Year Student is here to give you real-time support online.
scene04.full.p1: We're living through a defining wave of technological change. How you use AI and other new tools to support your studies and university life — and how you let them deepen, rather than replace, your own thinking — will be something we work on together. More important still: as you explore these new technologies, I hope you'll also learn respect for life, care for people, and an eye for beauty.
scene04.full.p2: When you arrive at NCKU you'll find a campus where old and new Tainan meet: red-brick tiled roofs, the lush Banyan Garden, the renewed Future Hall, the lovingly restored Museum, the cross-disciplinary Macronix Building, the smart, friendly and inclusive Dongning dormitory, and the old and new department buildings standing side by side along the tree-lined Engineering Boulevard with its drifting flower scents — and the seasonal plantings that change colour all year. These will become the texture of the university life ahead of you.
scene04.full.p3: A small note of caution from your President: on bright southern Taiwan afternoons, a sudden downpour can soak you through if you've forgotten your umbrella. Dear student, please remember — when setback, sadness, or doubt finds you, we'll be there with you, facing the storm and looking for the rainbow that only appears after the heaviest rain.
scene04.full.p4: I hope you'll write yourself a rich and unforgettable chapter here, and leave a brilliant trail across your life. Good luck.
